lines.speaker: Captain Cleive
lines.text: Hello there. What do you need?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Captain Cleive
lines.text: This is one of the lairs of those foul Lizardmen. We've managed to corner these ones so they can't escape.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Captain Cleive
lines.text: Cleive. Captain Cleive. Captain in the Shayzien Guard and renowned slayer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Renowned?

lines.speaker: Captain Cleive
lines.text: Absolutely. I'm part of a great family of slayers. You've probably met a few of them over on the mainland.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you here?

lines.speaker: Captain Cleive
lines.text: We learnt of a group of Lizardman Shamans causing trouble on the surface. I led a taskforce out to drive them back into their lair.

lines.speaker: Captain Cleive
lines.text: We suffered many losses but we've now managed to trap them in this cave.

lines.speaker: Captain Cleive
lines.text: We've lost too many men to be able to finish them off but I'm happy for someone else to do it if I feel they're worthy of the challenge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I fight these Lizardmen?

lines.speaker: Captain Cleive
lines.text: Perhaps. I've lost too many men to be able to kill them myself but I'm happy for someone else to do it if I feel they're worthy of the challenge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you define as worthy?

lines.speaker: Captain Cleive
lines.text: You'll need to be favoured by the people of Shayzien. You'll also need to be on a Lizardman Slayer task.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I use my slayer helm instead of a Shayzien helm?

lines.speaker: Captain Cleive
lines.text: Yes that is possible, however I only show the required technique to those who have proved themselves a friend to Kourend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I prove that I am a friend to Kourend?

lines.speaker: Captain Cleive
lines.text: You'll need to complete the Hard tier of the Kourend & Kebos Achievement Diary and have earned the tier five Shayzien helm.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't meet those requirements. I'll be back when I do though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have that completed! Can you show me the special technique now?

lines.speaker: Captain Cleive
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Captain Cleive
lines.text: I have already shown you that secret technique.

sections.title: When attempting to kill lizardman shamans outside of a slayer task

lines.speaker: Captain Clieve[sic]
lines.text: Hey! These lizardmen aren't just for anyone. Come back when you have the right Slayer task!
